verses.text: God bids avenge Israel on the Midianites. Vengeance. The tempters are to be judged.
God bids avenge Israel on the Midianites. Vengeance. The tempters are to be judged.
God bids avenge Israel on the Midianites. Vengeance. The tempters are to be judged.
A thousand from each tribe go to war with Phinehas. The army. A small force at God's command.
A thousand from each tribe go to war with Phinehas. The army. A small force at God's command.
A thousand from each tribe go to war with Phinehas. The army. A small force at God's command.
They slay the Midianite men and kings; Balaam too is slain. Balaam. The false prophet meets his end.
They slay the Midianite men and kings; Balaam too is slain. Balaam. The false prophet meets his end.
They take the women, children, and spoil to the camp. Spoil. The plunder is brought back.
They take the women, children, and spoil to the camp. Spoil. The plunder is brought back.
They take the women, children, and spoil to the camp. Spoil. The plunder is brought back.
They take the women, children, and spoil to the camp. Spoil. The plunder is brought back.
Moses is angry the women were spared. Rebuke. The guilty are not to live.
Moses is angry the women were spared. Rebuke. The guilty are not to live.
Moses is angry the women were spared. Rebuke. The guilty are not to live.
These women caused the sin at Peor; only the young girls live. The snare. The tempters are judged.
These women caused the sin at Peor; only the young girls live. The snare. The tempters are judged.
These women caused the sin at Peor; only the young girls live. The snare. The tempters are judged.
The warriors must purify themselves outside the camp. Cleansed. War defiles; they must be purified.
The warriors must purify themselves outside the camp. Cleansed. War defiles; they must be purified.
The spoil is purified by fire and water. Purified. Even goods are cleansed.
The spoil is purified by fire and water. Purified. Even goods are cleansed.
The spoil is purified by fire and water. Purified. Even goods are cleansed.
The spoil is purified by fire and water. Purified. Even goods are cleansed.
The prey is divided between soldiers and congregation. Divided. The spoil is shared.
The prey is divided between soldiers and congregation. Divided. The spoil is shared.
The prey is divided between soldiers and congregation. Divided. The spoil is shared.
A tribute from it is given to the LORD. Tribute. God's portion is set apart.
A tribute from it is given to the LORD. Tribute. God's portion is set apart.
A tribute from it is given to the LORD. Tribute. God's portion is set apart.
A tribute from it is given to the LORD. Tribute. God's portion is set apart.
The number of the spoil is reckoned. Reckoned. All is counted before God.
The number of the spoil is reckoned. Reckoned. All is counted before God.

The number of the spoil is reckoned. Reckoned. All is counted before God.

The number of the spoil is reckoned. Reckoned. All is counted before God.
The congregation's half is set apart. The half. The people share the spoil.
The congregation's half is set apart. The half. The people share the spoil.
The congregation's half is set apart. The half. The people share the spoil.
A portion is given to the Levites. The Levites. They too receive their part.
A portion is given to the Levites. The Levites. They too receive their part.
A portion is given to the Levites. The Levites. They too receive their part.
A portion is given to the Levites. The Levites. They too receive their part.
The officers bring an offering, for not a man was lost. Thanksgiving. They give for God's protection.
The officers bring an offering, for not a man was lost. Thanksgiving. They give for God's protection.
The officers bring an offering, for not a man was lost. Thanksgiving. They give for God's protection.
The gold is brought for a memorial before the LORD. Memorial. The victory is remembered.
